title: tephroseris rufa
intro: Tephroseris rufa, also known as the rusty geranium or rusty cineraria, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant contains compounds that have been found to have antimicrobial and antiviral effects, which may help to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and support the immune system. Tephroseris rufa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
